resolutions.//: Selective version resolutions. Two scoping forms in Yarn 1: (1) unscoped "pkg": "^X" forces ONE version everywhere — safe only for single-major packages. (2) Path-scoped "**/parent/pkg": "^X" forces pkg only when nested under parent — required for multi-major (e.g. picomatch 2.x+4.x, glob 7.x+11.x). The **/ prefix is mandatory; bare "parent/pkg" is silently ignored by Yarn 1 for transitively-nested instances. Each allowlist removal must be paired with a resolution (or a fresh-lockfile cascade). Workflow: edit package.json, rm yarn.lock + subgraphs/*/yarn.lock, yarn install in root + each subgraph, node scripts/audit-install-hooks.mjs --update, node scripts/audit.mjs — any "no longer in production tree" warnings name audit-allowlist entries that can now be removed.
